requirement_topic.zh: OCPP互操作与EMC/剩余电流保护设计
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP互操作與EMC/剩餘電流保護設計

summary.en: Bosnia projects may require OCPP for backend interoperability and separate evidence for EU-aligned electrical safety, including EMC and residual-current-protection design. OCPP 1.6, OCPP 2.0.1, and OCPP 2.1 versions may be used depending on operator and procurement scope, with security profile and backend integration requirements to be specified per station contract.
summary.zh: 波斯尼亚项目可能要求OCPP实现后台互操作，并且还需独立提供欧盟对齐的电气安全证据，包括EMC与剩余电流保护设计。OCPP 1.6、OCPP 2.0.1和OCPP 2.1可按运营方和采购范围使用，并应在站点合同中明确安全配置和后台集成要求。
summary.zht: 波斯尼亞專案可能要求OCPP實現後台互操作，並且還需獨立提供歐盟對齊的電氣安全證據，包括EMC與剩餘電流保護設計。OCPP 1.6、OCPP 2.0.1和OCPP 2.1可按營運方和採購範圍使用，並應在站點合約中明確安全配置和後台整合要求。

standards_or_laws: Relevant Bosnia and Herzegovina grid-side and station protection requirements

summary.en: China-market DC chargers commonly rely on GB/T 27930 for charger-to-vehicle battery-management communication. That protocol is not operator backend protocol and does not replace OCPP, station cybersecurity, backend acceptance testing, or firmware-management procedures required by Bosnia projects.
summary.zh: 中国市场直流充电机通常依赖GB/T 27930用于充电机与车载BMS通信。该协议不属于运营方后台协议，不能替代OCPP、站点网络安全、后台验收测试或波斯尼亚项目所要求的固件管理程序。
summary.zht: 中國市場直流充電機通常依賴GB/T 27930用於充電機與車載BMS通信。該協議不屬於運營方後台協議，不能替代OCPP、站點網路安全、後台驗收測試或波斯尼亞專案所要求的韌體管理流程。

gap.en: Bosnia deployment files should identify exact OCPP version, security profile, certificate handling, meter-value mapping, transaction model, remote reset and firmware update process, interface architecture, and test evidence from the target charging management system.
gap.zh: 波斯尼亚部署文件应明确OCPP版本、安全配置、证书处理、计量映射、交易模型、远程复位和固件更新流程、通信架构，以及目标充电管理系统的测试证据。
gap.zht: 波斯尼亞部署文件應明確OCPP版本、安全配置、證書處理、計量映射、交易模型、遠端復位與韌體更新流程、通訊架構，以及目標充電管理系統的測試證據。

mandatory_status.target: Usually mandatory when required by operator, tender, roaming, payment, or maintenance specification; OCPP and EMC evidence are not standalone whole-unit safety certification
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is vehicle-side communication and does not satisfy OCPP backend or Bosnia operator interoperability requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm OCPP version and security profile with the Bosnia operator before shipment and define EMC/RCD implementation for the target deployment route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出货前应与波斯尼亚运营方确认OCPP版本和安全配置，并对目标部署路径定义EMC/剩余电流防护实现。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出貨前應與波斯尼亞營運方確認OCPP版本和安全配置，並針對目標部署路徑定義EMC/剩餘電流防護實施。
